comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Corrupt (4-knob). build.py reads THIS file. Zero-crossing pitch track -> square master + sub octave + octave-up harmony, Tone low-pass to tame the harsh square edges.
gid_comment: 0x08 = Delay category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DLY_. Grouped under DLY (fewest stock effects = easy to find).
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
